productDisplayName: Rockport Men Rocky Brookl Nubuck Black Floater
description: Created with comfort in mind, these Rocky Brook sandals from rockport are a great addition to your wardrobe. Ruggedly crafted from heel to toe, this pair is both stylish and comfortable. Pair these with casual wear for a cool look or with bermudas and tees when you go out exploring.Upper Leather upper with mesh for rugged feel and style Fabric lining for soft touch and protection from blisters Back strap to hold the foot firmly in place Midsole Moulded and well cushioned EVA midsole for long term durability and protection of feet against impact Moisture absorbent PU footbed for added dry comfort and breathability of the feet Outsole Rubber outsole provides durable traction on a variety of surfaces Flex grooves and traction rich rubber sole for anti-slip comfort shoe careUse a leather brush to dust off the dirtUse a leather shoe polish to make the shoes shineDo not store in direct sunlight
